description: Creates a point on an explicit plot function at a given x-value. Evaluates f(x) at the specified x to determine the y coordinate.
utility: Place a point on a plot curve at a specific x-value

arguments.name: x
arguments.description: X-value at which to evaluate the plot function

alternates.description: Point on a plot curve at x-value

examples.scenario: Point on sine curve at x=0
Point on sine curve at x=pi/2
examples.expression:
y = plot(G, "sin(x)")
Q = plotpoint(G, y, pi/2)
